TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == mulangaway a pucu' ÁĒüśģĖÁīįŤÉěÁė§ == mulangaway a pucu', u nikaimelangan tahekal sa mulangaway a pucu'. mulangaway a pucu' hakiya idaw ku la'cusay atu kapahay a pucu'an, sa malaimelan a nikatahekalan namakayda i papangaan " laliwawaan atu butulan", u laliwawaan yu misangan tu wawa henay nu la'cesay a nikapucuan. . sakay imelangÁóÖÁźÜ idaw ku sananay nu mikinkiway a tademaw saan, mahiniay a imelangan, itida henay tu sakalawawa nu caayay ka kapah nu nilangawan a si-paw mutacuwa mungangaw ku nikatayda sananay, duma satu nipaceba a musakamu saan u tatengaay a laliwawaan a si-paw itida tu mulahat, patayda tu kapahay a ci-inan atu itida tu patideng tu papatidengan. itida i hekalay maadihay a pangan si-paw-liw u la'cusay namin a lebawaan, malimad taydan i sen-ce-sin a caayay ka kisaan nu tawyaay a lebawaan, nika idaw ku nikaadihan tu sin-sen hekalay nu sen-ce-si-paw-liw a lebawa sananay, dumasa picidekan u sasingaganay u ti-wi-pu-ci-tay-liw, mahiniay a lebawaan hinaadih kita tu mahka nilecuhan a wawaan. milihida tu hatidaay nu sicung-ke-cun-liw a tademawan, 15%-20% u sen-ce-si-paw-liw naming, nu 50% u kapahay namin a lebawaan. . kakenihanŚąÜť°ě sen-ce-si-paw-liw caay kalacad ku nisakaputan, sakaimelang nu kitadaan caay kalecad. malatusa kina sasakamuen:sen-ce-sin a sen-ce-si-paw-liw pasu pea-kaput-liw atu wawa nu naiay a-sin-si-paw-liw atu nuydaan a si-paw-liw. . cayay kaw sen-ce-sin a sen-ce-si-paw-liw pasu duma nu sen-ce-si-paw-liw " masacacayay atu malamelay". . ninatusaay a pasasiduma nu elih caay kalecad ku imi. at usen-ce-sin sen-ce-si-paw-liw palecaden, u cayay kaw sen-ce-sin a lebawa u amelikay malahat, nikatinengan nina imelang palecad han tu mihcaan mikitabal tu " tulim palecad lulim mihcaan", nika i nikuda nu lima a mihcaan tu nika udip apuyu tu. sen-ce-sin lebawa nu imelangan a tademaw kapah aca ku nikauip, u mahiniay a imelangan misuayaw tu haw-sey nipasapayuan atu fan-se-sin payuan hinatinengtineng. aydaay anipayuan tu cayay kaw sen-ce-sin a lebawaan a nikudan nu nika kapahan idaw ku nikatalakawan, nika sipakayda i puo-ci payuan a nipicukaymasan. . kalamelan ś∑∑ŚźąŚěč kalamelan nu sen-ce-si-paw-liw sipakayda i caayay kalecad nu waywayan a tahekal. picidekan hina adih kit utu masahicaay a kakuan pan-fa-nei-pi-duo-liw. mahicaay nu la'cusay a ngangan sa sen-ce-si-paw-liw u mihicaay a lebawaan kanca idaw ku pea-tay gang, hakiya idaw ku zun-maw-muo-gang, atu kalecadan a tahekal nu tuluay. . hatidaay tu nu sila'cusay pangan si-paw gang a imelangay akinatulu paising tu sakalamel nu hua-sye laiwha. situngusay tinasapingaay tu panga si-paw gang a sapayuan pangangan han tu PEB atu BEP. Pasu puo-lay-mei-su, yi-tuo-puo-kan, puo-ci-kan sakay lebawaan a sapayuan " sun-lu-an-puo". 40 malingatu tu a mikinkiw ku wawa cung-liw-sye masakaputay tu wawa a sen-ce-si-paw-liw a mikingkiw. kanatal CNS GCT mikingkiway malingatu misuayaw tu labu nu tangah a sen-ce-si-paw lebawaan a nipikinkiw. caysiw-siwpic mihcaan itini i kanatalan nu pangaan si-paw nikakenisan, u nananaman henay tu la'cusay a panga si-paw lebawa u muliyaway sakatalawan a duguan. 1997 . idaw ku mikinkiway tu tatayna nu saliwawaan a lebawaan makaadih, itida mahidaay u badisusu nu kapahay a lebawaan caay ka sumada malala'cusay nu lebawaan. u kapahay nu lebawaan taneng sipakayda i kikayan mikinsa, hece-kun-cen atu CT malucek ku nikinsaan, sisa palutatengan ku misaydan tu ahicaen kiya u sakapahay a sizicuan sa, namakayda i saadidiay masumad malagan a sakatalawan. saan, taneng hicaen tu sakapahay a payuan misuayaw tu sakalaheci idaw ku kapahay. caysiw-siwlu mihcaan idaw ku Su-ke-lan nika adihan a mikinkiw, siplimsip a tademawan idaw ku caayan kaw nu pangaay a si-paw lebawaan nu tatami, itida i caysiw-pinlim mihcaan katukuh i caysiw-walsiw mihcaan a imelang, lima a mihcaan ku nika udipan anu taayawen ku nipikilul mikinsa matabal tu a mangaay. ina u kumes nu butulan a gang ini nu pangaan a sipawan u sakautiihan a mangaay. CT .
S.PHON: == mur~…ĺaŇčawaj a pu ¶u Ē~ ° ***** == mur~…ĺaŇčawaj a pu ¶u Ē~ °, u nikaim…ôr~…ĺaŇčan tańß…ôkar~…ĺ sa mur~…ĺaŇčawaj a pu ¶u Ē~ °. mur~…ĺaŇčawaj a pu ¶u Ē~ ° ńßakija idaw ku r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj atu kapańßaj a pu ¶u Ē~ °an, sa mar~…ĺaim…ôr~…ĺan a nikatańß…ôkar~…ĺan namakajda i papaŇčaan " r~…ĺar~…ĺiwawaan atu butur~…ĺan", u r~…ĺar~…ĺiwawaan ju misaŇčan tu wawa ńß…ônaj nu r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶…ôsaj a nikapu ¶uan. . sakaj im…ôr~…ĺaŇč** idaw ku sananaj nu mikinkiwaj a tad…ômaw saan, mańßiniaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan, itida ńß…ônaj tu sakar~…ĺawawa nu ¶aajaj ka kapańß nu nir~…ĺaŇčawan a si-paw muta ¶uwa muŇčaŇčaw ku nikatajda sananaj, duma satu nipa ¶…ôba a musakamu saan u tat…ôŇčaaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺiwawaan a si-paw itida tu mur~…ĺańßat, patajda tu kapańßaj a ¶i-inan atu itida tu patid…ôŇč tu papatid…ôŇčan. itida i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj maadińßaj a paŇčan si-paw-r~…ĺiw u r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj namin a r~…ĺ…ôbawaan, mar~…ĺimad tajdan i s…ôn- ¶…ô-sin a ¶aajaj ka kisaan nu tawjaaj a r~…ĺ…ôbawaan, nika idaw ku nikaadińßan tu sin-s…ôn ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj nu s…ôn- ¶…ô-si-paw-r~…ĺiw a r~…ĺ…ôbawa sananaj, dumasa pi ¶id…ôkan u sasiŇčaganaj u ti-wi-pu- ¶i-taj-r~…ĺiw, mańßiniaj a r~…ĺ…ôbawaan ńßinaadińß kita tu mańßka nir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan a wawaan. mir~…ĺińßida tu ńßatidaaj nu si ¶uŇč-k…ô- ¶un-r~…ĺiw a tad…ômawan, **%-**% u s…ôn- ¶…ô-si-paw-r~…ĺiw namiŇč, nu **% u kapańßaj namin a r~…ĺ…ôbawaan. . kak…ônińßan** s…ôn- ¶…ô-si-paw-r~…ĺiw ¶aaj kar~…ĺa ¶ad ku nisakaputan, sakaim…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu kitadaan ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad. mar~…ĺatusa kina sasakamu…ôn:s…ôn- ¶…ô-sin a s…ôn- ¶…ô-si-paw-r~…ĺiw pasu p…ôa-kaput-r~…ĺiw atu wawa nu naiaj a-sin-si-paw-r~…ĺiw atu nujdaan a si-paw-r~…ĺiw. . ¶ajaj kaw s…ôn- ¶…ô-sin a s…ôn- ¶…ô-si-paw-r~…ĺiw pasu duma nu s…ôn- ¶…ô-si-paw-r~…ĺiw " masa ¶a ¶ajaj atu mar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺaj". . ninatusaaj a pasasiduma nu …ôr~…ĺińß ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku imi. at us…ôn- ¶…ô-sin s…ôn- ¶…ô-si-paw-r~…ĺiw par~…ĺ…ô ¶ad…ôn, u ¶ajaj kaw s…ôn- ¶…ô-sin a r~…ĺ…ôbawa u am…ôr~…ĺikaj mar~…ĺańßat, nikatin…ôŇčan nina im…ôr~…ĺaŇč par~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ńßan tu mińß ¶aan mikitabar~…ĺ tu " tur~…ĺim par~…ĺ…ô ¶ad r~…ĺur~…ĺim mińß ¶aan", nika i nikuda nu r~…ĺima a mińß ¶aan tu nika udip apuju tu. s…ôn- ¶…ô-sin r~…ĺ…ôbawa nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan a tad…ômaw kapańß a ¶a ku nikauip, u mańßiniaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan misuajaw tu ńßaw-s…ô nipasapajuan atu fan-s…ô-sin pajuan ńßinatin…ôŇčtin…ôŇč. ajdaaj anipajuan tu ¶ajaj kaw s…ôn- ¶…ô-sin a r~…ĺ…ôbawaan a nikudan nu nika kapańßan idaw ku nikatar~…ĺakawan, nika sipakajda i puo- ¶i pajuan a nipi ¶ukajmasan. . kar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺan *** kar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺan nu s…ôn- ¶…ô-si-paw-r~…ĺiw sipakajda i ¶aajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu wajwajan a tańß…ôkar~…ĺ. pi ¶id…ôkan ńßina adińß kit utu masańßi ¶aaj a kakuan pan-fa-n…ôi-pi-duo-r~…ĺiw. mańßi ¶aaj nu r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj a ŇčaŇčan sa s…ôn- ¶…ô-si-paw-r~…ĺiw u mińßi ¶aaj a r~…ĺ…ôbawaan kan ¶a idaw ku p…ôa-taj gaŇč, ńßakija idaw ku zun-maw-muo-gaŇč, atu kar~…ĺ…ô ¶adan a tańß…ôkar~…ĺ nu tur~…ĺuaj. . ńßatidaaj tu nu sir~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj paŇčan si-paw gaŇč a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj akinatur~…ĺu paisiŇč tu sakar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ nu ńßua-sj…ô r~…ĺaiwńßa. situŇčusaj tinasapiŇčaaj tu paŇča si-paw gaŇč a sapajuan paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu p…ôb atu b…ôp. pasu puo-r~…ĺaj-m…ôi-su, ji-tuo-puo-kan, puo- ¶i-kan sakaj r~…ĺ…ôbawaan a sapajuan " sun-r~…ĺu-an-puo". ** mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu a mikinkiw ku wawa ¶uŇč-r~…ĺiw-sj…ô masakaputaj tu wawa a s…ôn- ¶…ô-si-paw-r~…ĺiw a mikiŇčkiw. kanatar~…ĺ ¶ns g ¶t mikiŇčkiwaj mar~…ĺiŇčatu misuajaw tu r~…ĺabu nu taŇčańß a s…ôn- ¶…ô-si-paw r~…ĺ…ôbawaan a nipikinkiw. ¶ajsiw-siwpi ¶ mińß ¶aan itini i kanatar~…ĺan nu paŇčaan si-paw nikak…ônisan, u nananaman ńß…ônaj tu r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj a paŇča si-paw r~…ĺ…ôbawa u mur~…ĺijawaj sakatar~…ĺawan a duguan. **** . idaw ku mikinkiwaj tu tatajna nu sar~…ĺiwawaan a r~…ĺ…ôbawaan makaadińß, itida mańßidaaj u badisusu nu kapańßaj a r~…ĺ…ôbawaan ¶aaj ka sumada mar~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj nu r~…ĺ…ôbawaan. u kapańßaj nu r~…ĺ…ôbawaan tan…ôŇč sipakajda i kikajan mikinsa, ńß…ô ¶…ô-kun- ¶…ôn atu ¶t mar~…ĺu ¶…ôk ku nikinsaan, sisa par~…ĺutat…ôŇčan ku misajdan tu ańßi ¶a…ôn kija u sakapańßaj a sizi ¶uan sa, namakajda i saadidiaj masumad mar~…ĺagan a sakatar~…ĺawan. saan, tan…ôŇč ńßi ¶a…ôn tu sakapańßaj a pajuan misuajaw tu sakar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i idaw ku kapańßaj. ¶ajsiw-siwr~…ĺu mińß ¶aan idaw ku su-k…ô-r~…ĺan nika adińßan a mikinkiw, sipr~…ĺimsip a tad…ômawan idaw ku ¶aajan kaw nu paŇčaaj a si-paw r~…ĺ…ôbawaan nu tatami, itida i ¶ajsiw-pinr~…ĺim mińß ¶aan katukuńß i ¶ajsiw-war~…ĺsiw mińß ¶aan a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, r~…ĺima a mińß ¶aan ku nika udipan anu taajaw…ôn ku nipikir~…ĺur~…ĺ mikinsa matabar~…ĺ tu a maŇčaaj. ina u kum…ôs nu butur~…ĺan a gaŇč ini nu paŇčaan a sipawan u sakautiińßan a maŇčaaj. ¶t .
S.FORM: == mulangaway a pucu' ÁĒüśģĖÁīįŤÉěÁė§ == mulangaway a pucu', u nikaimelangan tahekal sa mulangaway a pucu'. mulangaway a pucu' hakiya idaw ku la'cusay atu kapahay a pucu'an, sa malaimelan a nikatahekalan namakayda i papangaan " laliwawaan atu butulan", u laliwawaan yu misangan tu wawa henay nu la'cesay a nikapucuan. . sakay imelangÁóÖÁźÜ idaw ku sananay nu mikinkiway a tademaw saan, mahiniay a imelangan, itida henay tu sakalawawa nu caayay ka kapah nu nilangawan a si-paw mutacuwa mungangaw ku nikatayda sananay, duma satu nipaceba a musakamu saan u tatengaay a laliwawaan a si-paw itida tu mulahat, patayda tu kapahay a ci-inan atu itida tu patideng tu papatidengan. itida i hekalay maadihay a pangan si-paw-liw u la'cusay namin a lebawaan, malimad taydan i sen-ce-sin a caayay ka kisaan nu tawyaay a lebawaan, nika idaw ku nikaadihan tu sin-sen hekalay nu sen-ce-si-paw-liw a lebawa sananay, dumasa picidekan u sasingaganay u ti-wi-pu-ci-tay-liw, mahiniay a lebawaan hinaadih kita tu mahka nilecuhan a wawaan. milihida tu hatidaay nu sicung-ke-cun-liw a tademawan, 15%-20% u sen-ce-si-paw-liw naming, nu 50% u kapahay namin a lebawaan. . kakenihanŚąÜť°ě sen-ce-si-paw-liw caay kalacad ku nisakaputan, sakaimelang nu kitadaan caay kalecad. malatusa kina sasakamuen:sen-ce-sin a sen-ce-si-paw-liw pasu pea-kaput-liw atu wawa nu naiay a-sin-si-paw-liw atu nuydaan a si-paw-liw. . cayay kaw sen-ce-sin a sen-ce-si-paw-liw pasu duma nu sen-ce-si-paw-liw " masacacayay atu malamelay". . ninatusaay a pasasiduma nu elih caay kalecad ku imi. at usen-ce-sin sen-ce-si-paw-liw palecaden, u cayay kaw sen-ce-sin a lebawa u amelikay malahat, nikatinengan nina imelang palecad han tu mihcaan mikitabal tu " tulim palecad lulim mihcaan", nika i nikuda nu lima a mihcaan tu nika udip apuyu tu. sen-ce-sin lebawa nu imelangan a tademaw kapah aca ku nikauip, u mahiniay a imelangan misuayaw tu haw-sey nipasapayuan atu fan-se-sin payuan hinatinengtineng. aydaay anipayuan tu cayay kaw sen-ce-sin a lebawaan a nikudan nu nika kapahan idaw ku nikatalakawan, nika sipakayda i puo-ci payuan a nipicukaymasan. . kalamelan ś∑∑ŚźąŚěč kalamelan nu sen-ce-si-paw-liw sipakayda i caayay kalecad nu waywayan a tahekal. picidekan hina adih kit utu masahicaay a kakuan pan-fa-nei-pi-duo-liw. mahicaay nu la'cusay a ngangan sa sen-ce-si-paw-liw u mihicaay a lebawaan kanca idaw ku pea-tay gang, hakiya idaw ku zun-maw-muo-gang, atu kalecadan a tahekal nu tuluay. . hatidaay tu nu sila'cusay pangan si-paw gang a imelangay akinatulu paising tu sakalamel nu hua-sye laiwha. situngusay tinasapingaay tu panga si-paw gang a sapayuan pangangan han tu PEB atu BEP. Pasu puo-lay-mei-su, yi-tuo-puo-kan, puo-ci-kan sakay lebawaan a sapayuan " sun-lu-an-puo". 40 malingatu tu a mikinkiw ku wawa cung-liw-sye masakaputay tu wawa a sen-ce-si-paw-liw a mikingkiw. kanatal CNS GCT mikingkiway malingatu misuayaw tu labu nu tangah a sen-ce-si-paw lebawaan a nipikinkiw. caysiw-siwpic mihcaan itini i kanatalan nu pangaan si-paw nikakenisan, u nananaman henay tu la'cusay a panga si-paw lebawa u muliyaway sakatalawan a duguan. 1997 . idaw ku mikinkiway tu tatayna nu saliwawaan a lebawaan makaadih, itida mahidaay u badisusu nu kapahay a lebawaan caay ka sumada malala'cusay nu lebawaan. u kapahay nu lebawaan taneng sipakayda i kikayan mikinsa, hece-kun-cen atu CT malucek ku nikinsaan, sisa palutatengan ku misaydan tu ahicaen kiya u sakapahay a sizicuan sa, namakayda i saadidiay masumad malagan a sakatalawan. saan, taneng hicaen tu sakapahay a payuan misuayaw tu sakalaheci idaw ku kapahay. caysiw-siwlu mihcaan idaw ku Su-ke-lan nika adihan a mikinkiw, siplimsip a tademawan idaw ku caayan kaw nu pangaay a si-paw lebawaan nu tatami, itida i caysiw-pinlim mihcaan katukuh i caysiw-walsiw mihcaan a imelang, lima a mihcaan ku nika udipan anu taayawen ku nipikilul mikinsa matabal tu a mangaay. ina u kumes nu butulan a gang ini nu pangaan a sipawan u sakautiihan a mangaay. CT .

nir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan a wawaan. mir~…ĺińßida tu ńßatidaaj nu si ¶uŇč-k…ô- ¶un-r~…ĺiw a tad…ômawan, **%-**% u s…ôn- ¶…ô-si-paw-r~…ĺiw namiŇč, nu **% u kapańßaj namin a r~…ĺ…ôbawaan. . kak…ônińßan** s…ôn- ¶…ô-si-paw-r~…ĺiw ¶aaj kar~…ĺa ¶ad ku nisakaputan, sakaim…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu kitadaan ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad. mar~…ĺatusa kina sasakamu…ôn:s…ôn- ¶…ô-sin a s…ôn- ¶…ô-si-paw-r~…ĺiw pasu p…ôa-kaput-r~…ĺiw atu wawa nu naiaj a-sin-si-paw-r~…ĺiw atu nujdaan a si-paw-r~…ĺiw. . ¶ajaj kaw s…ôn- ¶…ô-sin a s…ôn- ¶…ô-si-paw-r~…ĺiw pasu duma nu s…ôn- ¶…ô-si-paw-r~…ĺiw " masa ¶a ¶ajaj atu mar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺaj". . ninatusaaj a pasasiduma nu …ôr~…ĺińß ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku imi. at us…ôn- ¶…ô-sin s…ôn- ¶…ô-si-paw-r~…ĺiw par~…ĺ…ô ¶ad…ôn, u ¶ajaj kaw s…ôn- ¶…ô-sin a r~…ĺ…ôbawa u am…ôr~…ĺikaj mar~…ĺańßat, nikatin…ôŇčan nina im…ôr~…ĺaŇč par~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ńßan tu mińß ¶aan mikitabar~…ĺ tu " tur~…ĺim par~…ĺ…ô ¶ad r~…ĺur~…ĺim mińß ¶aan", nika i nikuda nu r~…ĺima a mińß ¶aan tu nika udip apuju tu. s…ôn- ¶…ô-sin r~…ĺ…ôbawa nu mar~…ĺu ¶…ôk ku nikinsaan, sisa par~…ĺutat…ôŇčan ku misajdan tu ańßi ¶a…ôn kija u sakapańßaj a sizi ¶uan sa, namakajda i saadidiaj masumad mar~…ĺagan a sakatar~…ĺawan. saan, tan…ôŇč ńßi ¶a…ôn tu
